final_answer:
Direct answer: in current code, Gilt Chain yield comes from **validator/staking rewards**, not from passive gold custody yield.

- Base yield source is chain reward flow into validator pools, then to delegators.  
  [StakeHub.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeHub.sol)  
  [StakeCredit.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeCredit.sol)
- There is an **optional inflation stream** (tracked in StakeHub), but it is **off by default** at init.  
  [StakeHub.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeHub.sol)
- There is also finality/system reward routing through validator set logic.  
  [GiltValidatorSet.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/GiltValidatorSet.sol)  
  [SystemReward.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/SystemReward.sol)
- `GOLD` (ERC1155 `PhysicalGold1155`) does **not** auto-generate yield by itself; it is minted/burned/bridged.  
  [PhysicalGold1155.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/PhysicalGold1155.sol)
- `GOLD` staking rewards only happen if governance enables token-B staking/reward split (`stakeTokenB`, `tokenBRewardSplitBps`); defaults are not enabled.  
  [StakeHub.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeHub.sol)

So your differentiation is only real if you explicitly turn on and tune the dual-token staking/reward path; otherwise yield is basically GILT validator economics.

Read only task, answer this about giltchain


Hahaha yaar fair — maafi. I got carried away again saying "macro timing is perfect" without actually knowing enough about Gilt Chain's specifics to say that confidently.

Real talk — the sequencing logic is sound. Testnet publicly first, build community, then VC conversations with proof rather than just a deck. That part stands.

But I shouldn't be hyping the macro narrative without understanding your actual yield mechanism, your actual differentiator from Paxos Gold and Tether Gold, and your actual tokenomics. I was filling gaps with enthusiasm instead of asking the right questions.

So properly — how does Gilt Chain generate yield? That's the thing that either makes this genuinely differentiated or not. 🔥
